channel.title: Comments on: A Keyboard with no Marks

item.title: By: Shobhan
item.dc:creator: Shobhan
item.description: There are covers for keyboard keys available in market...Wouldn't those be better? Just in case some person who doesn't know typing wants to access your mac...
item.content:encoded: There are covers for keyboard keys available in market…Wouldn’t those be better? Just in case some person who doesn’t know typing wants to access your mac…

item.title: By: Hemant
item.dc:creator: Hemant
item.description: Nice, but I don't know each and every key. So need the markings
item.content:encoded: Nice, but I don’t know each and every key. So need the markings

item.title: By: Zainil
item.dc:creator: Zainil
item.description: I would never love such a key board.. Even though I spent hours on my PC, at times it happens that I do some typing errors n then the importance of printed keyboard comes to me.. I have to look at my keyboard to correct the mistake..
item.content:encoded: I would never love such a key board.. Even though I spent hours on my PC, at times it happens that I do some typing errors n then the importance of printed keyboard comes to me.. I have to look at my keyboard to correct the mistake..

item.title: By: Rishab
item.dc:creator: Rishab
item.description: http://nooooooooooooooo.com/ As your Macbook gets older, there is a chance that the color will rub off to the screen (Over the years, it does tend to leave marks on the screen anyway).
item.content:encoded:
http://nooooooooooooooo.com/
As your Macbook gets older, there is a chance that the color will rub off to the screen (Over the years, it does tend to leave marks on the screen anyway).

item.title: By: Rishab
item.dc:creator: Rishab
item.description:
I think you'll appreciate the Das Keyboard Model S Ultimate. http://www.daskeyboard.com/model-s-ultimate/
Oh. And try Happy Hacking keyboard :P http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Happy_Hacking_Keyboard
item.content:encoded:
I think you’ll appreciate the Das Keyboard Model S Ultimate. http://www.daskeyboard.com/model-s-ultimate/

Oh. And try Happy Hacking keyboard 😛
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Happy_Hacking_Keyboard
